name: Grilled Butter "Fly Pattern" Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, cumin, and red pepper. Cook, stirring frequently, until the onion is tender; about 5 minutes. Stir in all remaining ingredients except pork chops. Simmer gently, stirring often, until slightly thickened, about 10 minutes. The sauce can be refrigerated for several weeks.
2. Prepare a medium-hot charcoal fire. When coals are covered with gray ash, add the pork chops. Grill, turning once, until cooked through; about 6 to 7 minutes per side. Brush with sauce approximately 5 minutes before being finished.
